---
language: swift
exerciseType: 1
---

# --instructions--

У вас есть `60` товаров в `store`, за день вы продали `50` из них и `bought` (`купили`) `55` новых.
Обновите количество товаров в `store`.

# --before-seed--

```swift
// DO NOT EDIT FROM HERE
import Foundation

var _testCount = 0
var _testFailedCount = 0
func tryCatch(_ assertion: Bool) {
    _testCount += 1
    if !assertion {
        _testFailedCount += 1
        print("Test Case '--err-t\(_testCount)--' failed")
    }
}
// DO NOT EDIT UNTIL HERE
```

# --seed--

```swift
var store = 60
var sold = 50
var bought = 55
// write after this line
```

# --asserts--

`store` должна быть равна `65`.

```swift
tryCatch(store == 65)
```

# --after-asserts--

```swift
print("Executed \(_testCount) tests, with \(_testFailedCount) failures")
```
# --solutions--

```swift
var store = 60
var sold = 50
var bought = 55
store += bought - sold;
```
